informal_pl: Istnieje 2-zmienny term EML ewaluujący do x/y dla x,y>0. Świadek to kompozycja chunków 041 (x·y) i 037 (1/y) zgodnie z Tabelą S2 (x/y := x · (1/y)).
informal_en: There exists a two-variable EML term evaluating to x/y for x,y>0. The witness composes chunk 041 (x·y) with chunk 037 (1/y) following Table S2 (x/y := x · (1/y)).
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm2_for_div : ∃ t : EMLTerm₂, ∀ x y : ℝ, 0 < x → 0 < y → EMLTerm₂.eval x y t = x / y := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 12. Positivity preserved via the underlying mul/inv witnesses. | RESOLVED. Aristotle returned a clean proof. Verified.
